basics.name: Rohan Yadav
basics.summary: PhD Scholar in Economics at IGIDR, Mumbai. Research interests include development economics, rural electrification, welfare delivery, energy access, labour outcomes, and applied public-policy evaluation.

education.institution: Indira Gandhi Institute of Development Research, Mumbai

publications.name: Targeted Electricity Subsidies and Rural Development: Evidence from India's RGGVY Program
Rural Electrification and the Demographic Transition in India
Does Digital Identification Improve Disability Welfare Delivery? Evidence from the Integration of the Unique Disability ID System in India

volunteer.organization: National Service Scheme, Banaras Hindu University
